reason: This node has no dependencies declared, which is acceptable for a setup/assumption node. However, it implicitly relies on the standard theorem that the predual of B(H) is the trace-class operators T_1(H), and that normal states correspond to density operators. While this is entirely standard, for a formal proof framework it would be better to either cite an external reference (e.g., Takesaki Vol. I, Theorem III.3.3 or Bratteli-Robinson I, Theorem 2.4.21) or introduce this as an explicit external dependency.
